subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of existence! The people of prostration are endowed with foreheads radiant as the most luminous sun through the grace of the Praiseworthy Station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت وجود اهل سجود را جبینی روشن چون آفتاب انور از فیض مقام محمود
subcodes.subjects: @attaining the life of the spirit, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
